title: pycreus nilagiricus
intro: Pycreus nilagiricus, also known as Nilgiri club rush, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, inflammation, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties which include antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Pycreus nilagiricus include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Pycreus nilagiricus include decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
